articles.title: Parasites of Human Societies: How did we end up so close to cats?
articles.reaction: Historical perspective on how cats and humans have coexisted. Exploring the role cats played in human societies. Hunters and pets. It highlights our long history and how it has evolved over time.

articles.title: General Cat Care Basics
articles.reaction: Helpful guide to basic feline caretaking. Covering everything from food and hygiene to toy rotation and routine care habits.

articles.title: Keeping Your Cat Happy Indoors
articles.reaction: Window time, climbing space, and short play bursts line up with what works well at home.
